title: Carpet Roxy Addition
description: A Carpet Extension that contains some useful or useless functions which are needed but not included
body:
A [Carpet Mod](https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet) (fabric-carpet) extension that contains some useful or useless functions and some functions that I want but are not included
Under the default configuration conditions, this mod will not change any vanilla behavior at all
Use with carpet mod in the same Minecraft version. Use newer carpet mod versions whenever possible For more details of the mod, see the document [here
](https://github.com/123456789-code/CarpetRoxyAddition)
